basic_details.job_title: TMC ACTREC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Medical Officer/ Clinician Scientist Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (TMC ACTREC)
basic_details.short_information: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (TMC ACTREC) Medical Officer 'E' / Clinician Scientist 'E' Notification 2026 has been released on the official website actrec.gov.in. A total of 3 vacancies for Medical Officer 'E' (Radiodiagnosis & Infectious Diseases) and Clinician Scientist 'E' (Cellular Therapy) have been announced through the TMC ACTREC Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years as on 07-08-2026. Age Relaxation: 05 Years for SC/ST, 03 Years for OBC, 10 Years for PWD (additional 5 years in case of SC/ST & 3 years in case of OBC), Ex-servicemen: Length of service in Armed forces plus 3 years (additional relaxation in case of SC/ST/OBC), 5 Years for TMC employees.

qualification.education_qualification: M.D. / D.N.B. (Radiology / Radio-diagnosis) or equivalent postgraduate degree recognized by National Medical Commission, M.D. / M.S. in any field or equivalent post graduate degree recognized by National Medical Commission, DM Infectious Disease or equivalent post graduate degree recognised by National Medical Commission, MD Medicine/ Paediatrics or equivalent post graduate degree recognised by National Medical Commission and Fellowship in Infectious Diseases (of at least 01 year)
qualification.details: MEDICAL OFFICER 'E' (RADIODIAGNOSIS): M.D. / D.N.B. (Radiology / Radio-diagnosis) or equivalent postgraduate degree recognized by National Medical Commission. CLINICIAN SCIENTIST - CELLULAR THERAPY 'E': M.D. / M.S. in any field or equivalent post graduate degree recognized by National Medical Commission. MEDICAL OFFICER 'E' (INFECTIOUS DISEASES): DM Infectious Disease or equivalent post graduate degree recognised by National Medical Commission. OR MD Medicine/ Paediatrics or equivalent post graduate degree recognised by National Medical Commission and Fellowship in Infectious Diseases (of at least 01 year).

salary_details.details: Rs. 78800/- Per Month (Level -12, Cell 1 + Allowances applicable).

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TMC ACTREC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TMC ACTREC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download TMC ACTREC Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.advanced_centre_for_treatment_research_a: M.D. / D.N.B. (Radiology / Radio-diagnosis) or equivalent postgraduate degree recognized by National Medical Commission, M.D. / M.S. in any field or equivalent post graduate degree recognized by National Medical Commission, DM Infectious Disease or equivalent post graduate degree recognised by National Medical Commission, MD Medicine/ Paediatrics or equivalent post graduate degree recognised by National Medical Commission and Fellowship in Infectious Diseases (of at least 01 year)

content_sections.heading: TMC ACTREC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the TMC ACTREC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download TMC ACTREC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: TMC ACTREC Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: MEDICAL OFFICER 'E' (RADIODIAGNOSIS): M.D. / D.N.B. (Radiology / Radio-diagnosis) or equivalent postgraduate degree recognized by National Medical Commission. CLINICIAN SCIENTIST - CELLULAR THERAPY 'E': M.D. / M.S. in any field or equivalent post graduate degree recognized by National Medical Commission. MEDICAL OFFICER 'E' (INFECTIOUS DISEASES): DM Infectious Disease or equivalent post graduate degree recognised by National Medical Commission. OR MD Medicine/ Paediatrics or equivalent post graduate degree recognised by National Medical Commission and Fellowship in Infectious Diseases (of at least 01 year).

content_sections.heading: TMC ACTREC Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years as on 07-08-2026. Age Relaxation: 05 Years for SC/ST, 03 Years for OBC, 10 Years for PWD (additional 5 years in case of SC/ST & 3 years in case of OBC), Ex-servicemen: Length of service in Armed forces plus 3 years (additional relaxation in case of SC/ST/OBC), 5 Years for TMC employees.

content_sections.heading: TMC ACTREC Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Rs. 78800/- Per Month (Level -12, Cell 1 + Allowances applicable).

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TMC ACTREC Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TMC ACTREC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TMC ACTREC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the TMC ACTREC Recruitment 2026 is 07 August 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Medical Officer 'E' / Clinician Scientist 'E' posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Medical Officer 'E' / Clinician Scientist 'E' positions in the TMC ACTREC Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer 'E' (Radiodiagnosis) post?
faq.answer: For the Medical Officer 'E' (Radiodiagnosis) post, candidates must possess an M.D. / D.N.B. (Radiology / Radio-diagnosis) or an equivalent postgraduate degree recognized by the National Medical Commission.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts is 45 years as of 07 August 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 78800/- per month, which is at Level -12, Cell 1, plus applicable allowances.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates. However, General/OBC candidates are required to pay Rs. 300/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the TMC ACTREC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Maharashtra apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from any state in India can apply for this recruitment, provided they meet the eligibility criteria. The job location is Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the TMC ACTREC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official website of TMC ACTREC. The application link and detailed instructions are provided in the 'Important Links' section.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
